reference: Hello, I have been experiencing abdominal pain for the last two weeks. I also often feel breathless. I thought it might be a pregnancy symptom, so I performed a urine test, which came out negative. I do not think it can be pregnancy because if it were, I would be over seven months along, and I have had my regular periods. Additionally, my belly is not bulging out. Please help!
text: Hello. I have been experiencing abdominal pain for the last two weeks. I also often feel breathless. I thought it might be a pregnancy symptom, so I performed a urine test, which came out negative. I do not think it can be pregnancy because if it were, I would be over seven months along, and I have had my regular periods. Additionally, my belly is not bulging out. Please help.
